title: Water woes: Tense stand-off
description: KNYSNA NEWS AND VIDEO - Local community...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video","html":"Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS AND VIDEO - Local community activist Lynn Kayster, alongside Ward 11 representatives and other concerned residents, are currently in a tense stand-off with Knysna Municipal Manager Lulamile Mapholoba, chairperson of the Infrastructure Services Committee Russel Arends, and officials from the Directorate of Water and Sanitation.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS AND VIDEO - Local community activist Lynn Kayster, alongside Ward 11 representatives and other concerned residents, are currently in a tense stand-off with Knysna Municipal Manager Lulamile Mapholoba, chairperson of the Infrastructure Services Committee Russel Arends, and officials from the Directorate of Water and Sanitation."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The confrontation comes in response to a renewed water crisis affecting multiple areas after a planned outage on Saturday 11 October."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The emergency meeting is being held in the Knysna municipal boardroom.","html":"The emergency meeting is being held in the Knysna municipal boardroom."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Meanwhile, Knysna Municipality has issued a notice of level 3 water restrictions.","html":"Meanwhile, Knysna Municipality has issued a notice of level 3 water restrictions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The flow of the Knysna River is currently extremely low. It is important that residents keep in mind that Level 3 water restrictions remain in effect and must be strictly adhered to.","html":"The flow of the Knysna River is currently extremely low. It is important that residents keep in mind that Level 3 water restrictions remain in effect and must be strictly adhered to."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"VIDEO: Rozano Alie","html":"VIDEO: Rozano Alie"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Under level 3 restrictions, the following apply:"},{"type":"list","items":["Municipal potable water is for human consumption only.","No watering of gardens (not even with a bucket).","No washing of vehicles and/or boats.","All residents and businesses must limit water usage to 20kl per month."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This situation is being continuously monitored, and the restrictions may change at any time based on water availability.","html":"This situation is being continuously monitored, and the restrictions may change at any time based on water availability."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Photos: Rozano Alie","html":"Photos: Rozano Alie"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
